ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING non-target unique violation is statement atomic
assertions.query:
INSERT INTO atomic_on_conflict_do_nothing_items VALUES
							(2, 20),
							(3, 10)
						ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;

assertions.scriptName: ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING non-target unique violation is statement atomic
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING function side effects roll back on non-target unique error
assertions.query:
INSERT INTO on_conflict_do_nothing_function_target VALUES
							(2, audit_and_return_on_conflict_code(1, 20)),
							(3, audit_and_return_on_conflict_code(2, 10))
						ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;

assertions.scriptName: ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING function side effects roll back on non-target unique error
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING function side effects roll back on non-target unique error
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING skips duplicate input rows
assertions.query:
SELECT id, label
						FROM on_conflict_duplicate_input_items;

assertions.scriptName: ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE check violation is statement atomic
assertions.query:
INSERT INTO atomic_on_conflict_update_check_items VALUES
							(2, 2),
							(1, -1)
						ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET qty = EXCLUDED.qty;

assertions.scriptName: update duplicate key is statement atomic
assertions.query: UPDATE atomic_update_items SET code = 10, v = 'changed';

assertions.scriptName: update duplicate key is statement atomic
UPDATE FROM duplicate key is statement atomic
assertions.query:
UPDATE atomic_update_from_unique_items AS t
						SET code = s.new_code, v = s.new_v
						FROM atomic_update_from_unique_source AS s
						WHERE t.id = s.id;

assertions.scriptName: UPDATE FROM duplicate key is statement atomic
UPDATE FROM check constraint is statement atomic
assertions.query:
UPDATE atomic_update_from_items AS t
						SET qty = s.new_qty
						FROM atomic_update_from_source AS s
						WHERE t.id = s.id;

assertions.scriptName: UPDATE FROM check constraint is statement atomic
UPDATE FROM not null constraint is statement atomic
assertions.query:
UPDATE atomic_update_from_not_null_items AS t
						SET label = s.new_label
						FROM atomic_update_from_not_null_source AS s
						WHERE t.id = s.id;

assertions.scriptName: UPDATE FROM not null constraint is statement atomic
UPDATE FROM foreign key constraint is statement atomic
assertions.query:
UPDATE atomic_update_from_fk_children AS c
						SET parent_id = s.new_parent_id
						FROM atomic_update_from_fk_source AS s
						WHERE c.id = s.id;

CREATE TABLE AS rolls back function side effects on query error
assertions.query:
CREATE TABLE ctas_side_effect_target AS
						SELECT audit_and_return_bad_ctas(1) AS id, 1 / 0 AS boom;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE AS rolls back function side effects on query error
assertions.query: SELECT to_regclass('ctas_side_effect_target') IS NULL;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE AS rolls back function side effects on query error
assertions.query: SELECT count(*) FROM ctas_side_effect_audit;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW rolls back function side effects on query error
assertions.query:
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW matview_side_effect_target AS
						SELECT audit_and_return_bad_matview(1) AS id, 1 / 0 AS boom;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW rolls back function side effects on query error
assertions.query: SELECT to_regclass('matview_side_effect_target') IS NULL;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW rolls back function side effects on query error
assertions.query: SELECT count(*) FROM matview_side_effect_audit;

assertions.query: SELECT id FROM refresh_mv_side_effect_target;

assertions.scriptName: ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN rolls back default side effects on check error
assertions.query:
ALTER TABLE alter_default_side_effect_items
						ADD COLUMN qty INT DEFAULT audit_and_return_bad_default() CHECK (qty > 0);

assertions.scriptName: ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN rolls back default side effects on check error
assertions.query:
SELECT count(*)
						FROM information_schema.columns
						WHERE table_schema = 'public'
							AND table_name = 'alter_default_side_effect_items'
							AND column_name = 'qty';

assertions.scriptName: ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN rolls back default side effects on check error
assertions.query: SELECT count(*) FROM alter_default_side_effect_audit;
